author: y4rr
content: Tracked from #568. ferrotorch-core::stride_tricks::as_strided_scatter currently returns NotImplementedOnCuda for GPU tensors. Add a strided_scatter_f32/f64 method to GpuBackend trait + ferrotorch-gpu implementation that writes a contiguous src buffer into a target buffer at strided positions. Mirrors the existing strided_copy_f32/f64 but in the inverse direction. Once landed, autograd through as_strided will work end-to-end on CUDA. /rust-gpu-discipline: forbidden = silent t.to(Cpu) bounce in stride_tricks.rs::as_strided_scatter. Real CUDA kernel only.
